title: FIFA World Cup Boston 2026: Public Safety and Transportation Preparation and Budgeting Readiness Report

abstracts.abstract: Report of the Executive Office of Public Safety and Security in consultation with the Massachusetts Department of Transportation and Executive Office for Administration and Finance (pursuant to line item 8000-0600 of Section 2 of Chapter 9 of the Acts of 2025) submitting its FIFA World Cup Boston 2026: Public Safety and Transportation Preparation and Budgeting Readiness report
